Document:
# Adding New Spells
This guide explains how to create a new spell action in OpenEdge 14.
## Step 1: Create the Spell Action Entity
Create a prototype in [mono]Resources/Prototypes/_OE14/Magic/Spells/[/mono]:
- type: entity id: SpellMyFireball name: fireball noSpawn: true components: - type: InstantAction useDelay: 2 icon: sprite: /Textures/_OE14/Interface/Actions/spells.rsi state: fireball - type: OE14ActionManaCost cost: 20 - type: OE14SpellProjectile prototype: ProjectileFireball speed: 20
## Step 2: Create the Projectile (if needed)
- type: entity id: ProjectileFireball components: - type: Projectile damage: types: Heat: 30 - type: IgniteOnCollide
## Step 3: Add to a Skill
Reference the spell in a skill prototype (see [textlink="Adding New Skills" link="OE14_DEV_Guide_Skills"]):
- type: OE14SkillPrototype id: PyromancyT3 grants: - SpellMyFireball
## Step 4: Test
1. Learn the skill that grants the spell 2. Equip if spell comes from an item (via OE14SpellStorage) 3. Verify mana cost is deducted 4. Verify effect applies correctly
## Content Under Construction
More detailed guide with full examples for different spell types coming soon. See [textlink="Spell Mechanics" link="OE14_DEV_Skills_Mechanics"] for the mechanics overview.
